Book A Visit
The Heart of Our Foundation

Exploring Our World,
One Smile at a Time

A joyful journey from a small dream to India's most loved preschool community. Discover how we nurture curiosity and build bright futures.

Join Our Family
Welcome

Welcome to The Foundation!

At The Foundation, we believe every child is born curious and capable. Our school is a warm, joyful, and safe haven where little minds explore, discover, and grow — through play, art, music, and friendship.

Safe Environment

CCTV monitored, child-safe furniture, hygienic meals, and trained staff at all times.

Fun Learning

Play-based curriculum that sparks creativity, curiosity, and a lifelong love of learning.

Early Development

Focus on cognitive, social, emotional, and physical milestones in early childhood.

Our Journey

Our Story

2010

The Dream Begins

Founded by passionate early educators who believed in creating a nurturing space where children could truly thrive.

2014

Growing Family

Expanded to 3 campuses and welcomed our 500th student, building a true community of young learners and families.

2018

Award for Excellence

Recognized as the Best Preschool in the region for our innovative play-based curriculum and child development outcomes.

2024

Today & Beyond

2000+ graduates and still growing. Our commitment to joyful, child-centred education is stronger than ever.

What Drives Us

Mission & Vision

Our Mission

To provide every child with a joyful, safe, and stimulating early learning environment that builds a strong foundation for lifelong learning, social skills, and emotional well-being — regardless of background.

  • Holistic child development
  • Inclusive & caring classrooms
  • Partnership with parents

Our Vision

To be the most trusted and loved early childhood school in India, where every graduate leaves as a confident, curious, and compassionate young person ready to change the world.

  • Leading in early education innovation
  • Reaching every corner of India
  • Empowering the next generation
Trust & Safety

Why Parents Choose Us

CCTV Monitored

Full campus 24/7 CCTV surveillance for complete peace of mind.

Qualified Teachers

Certified in early childhood education with years of hands-on experience.

Hygienic Environment

Daily sanitised classrooms, fresh meals, and strict hygiene protocols.

Small Class Sizes

Low student-to-teacher ratio for personalised attention every day.

Activity-Based Curriculum

Learning through hands-on activities, projects, and play daily.

Outdoor Play Area

Large, safe outdoor playground encouraging growth and exploration.

How We Educate

Our Learning Approach

We don't just teach — we spark a love for learning. Our approach blends structured activities with open exploration, giving children agency in their own education journey.

Activity-Based Learning

Hands-on projects and real-world activities make concepts stick naturally.

Hands-On Experiences

Science experiments, art, building — children learn by doing, not just listening.

Social Interaction

Group activities build teamwork, empathy and communication skills early.

Creative Learning

Music, movement, storytelling and art are woven through every school day.

15+
Years of Joyful Learning
Our Programs

Programs We Offer

Pre Nursery

1.5 – 2.5 yrs

A gentle introduction to structured environment through sensory play, songs, and stories.

  • Sensory play
  • Music & rhymes
  • Storytelling
Learn More

Nursery

2.5 – 3.5 yrs

Building language, motor skills and social confidence in a warm classroom setting.

  • Language development
  • Fine motor skills
  • Social play
Learn More

LKG

3.5 – 4.5 yrs

Introduction to numbers, letters, and structured creative activities.

  • Pre-literacy
  • Pre-numeracy
  • Art & craft
Learn More

UKG

4.5 – 6 yrs

School readiness program that prepares children academically, socially and emotionally.

  • Reading readiness
  • Team projects
  • Critical thinking
Learn More
Parent Reviews

What Parents Say

"My child absolutely loves going to school every morning. The teachers are warm, caring and creative. Our school has been the best decision for our family."

Priya Sharma Mother of Ananya, 4 yrs

"The daily routine and play-based approach gave my shy son the confidence to make friends and express himself. We've seen incredible growth in just 6 months."

Rajesh Mehta Father of Arjun, 3 yrs

"As a parent, safety is my top priority. The CCTV, trained staff, and constant updates from teachers gave me complete peace of mind from day one."

Sunita Patel Mother of Keya, 5 yrs

"The teachers truly know each child by name and personality. My daughter's language development has been remarkable. So grateful for The Foundation!"

Amit Joshi Father of Riya, 4 yrs
Life at Our Foundation

Photo Gallery

View Full Gallery
Getting Started

Admission Process

Joining The Foundation is simple and welcoming. Here's how to get your child started on an amazing journey.

1

Inquiry

Call us or fill the online inquiry form. Our team will connect within 24 hours.

2

School Visit

Schedule a campus tour to see our facilities and meet our teachers.

3

Registration

Submit the registration form with required documents.

4

Enrollment

Pay fees, receive welcome kit, and your child is officially enrolled!

Start Admission

Give Your Child the Best Start in Life

Join thousands of happy families who've trusted The Foundation with their child's most important years. We'd love to welcome your little one!

Schedule a Visit Enroll Now

Building strong foundations for lifelong learning, social skills, and emotional well-being since 2010.
